title: Progressive Disclosure, References, Scripts, and Assets · Skill Brief: Script Design
summary: Refactor an oversized skill into a compact router and focused resources. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext script design increment in a progressively disclosed skill package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use deterministic scripts for repeatable validation, extraction, or scaffolding.
Organize authoritative references by decision point and expected use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

steps.title: Predict Script Design
steps.instruction:
theory case — Use a changed theory case for agent ext progressive disclosure that tests this competency: defend the module contract. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Script Design contract for the supplied data.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use deterministic scripts for repeatable validation, extraction, or scaffolding.

content.text: Use a changed theory case for agent ext progressive disclosure that tests this competency: defend the module contract. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Script Design condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: MCP Security Best Practices — Controls authorization threats, confused deputy, injection, SSRF, and mitigation practice.

options.text: Scripts should replace agent judgment in ambiguous decisions. This does not resolve predict script design.

For predict script design, apply Script Design without its stated preconditions, omit the a progressively disclosed skill package trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Script Design for a progressively disclosed skill package.
Use deterministic scripts for repeatable validation, extraction, or scaffolding. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.

content.text: Use deterministic scripts for repeatable validation, extraction, or scaffolding. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check the Script Design preconditions, operate on a progressively disclosed skill package in an inspectable order, then verify its result and boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern

Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Script Design, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a progressively disclosed skill package.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Scripts should replace agent judgment in ambiguous decisions. This fails the Script Design contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.
